steps.title: Take the reciprocal
steps.content:
The equation is
$$\frac{x}{6}=4$$
Taking reciprocals gives the target expression directly.
$$\frac{6}{x}=\frac{1}{4}$$

steps.title: Convert to the requested decimal
steps.content:
Evaluate the fraction as a decimal.
$$\frac{1}{4}=0.25$$
The answer is .25.
